svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Topology" id="topo-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1212" dy="661" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="750" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Network Topology (4 switches ring + NAT)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="h1
